baseline: 5tier_baseline mode (wc_10_enabled=false) on the same date+ticker pairs serves as the within-experiment baseline for SC-006 comparison. Existing 65-run corpus is the cross-experiment baseline.
notes: v1 pilot grid: 10 dates × 2 tickers × 2 modes = 40 propagates. ~$16 LLM (T2). Per spec.md SC-007 falsification framework.
